title: Achieve coverage >= 90%
summary: Rewrite most tests impacted by the refactor and reach >= 90% coverage in the existing pytest configuration.
outputs: Rewritten test suite covering refactored code paths
acceptance_criteria: Coverage >= 90% in the existing pytest configuration.
tasks: Rewrite most tests impacted by the refactor and rebuild the baseline.
Run pytest with coverage and capture current percentage.
Identify gaps and add/update tests to reach >= 90%.
notes: Focus on critical paths and error handling coverage.
Avoid changing tool schemas or behavior.
